mapper.select: select webhook_id, user_id, name, url, secret, events, is_enabled, create_at, update_at from webhook_endpoint where user_id = #{userId}
select webhook_id, user_id, name, url, secret, events, is_enabled, create_at, update_at from webhook_endpoint where webhook_id = #{webhookId}
select webhook_id, user_id, name, url, secret, events, is_enabled, create_at, update_at from webhook_endpoint where is_enabled = 1 and find_in_set(#{event}, events) > 0
mapper.insert: insert into webhook_endpoint (user_id, name, url, secret, events, is_enabled, create_at) values (#{userId}, #{name}, #{url}, #{secret}, #{events}, #{isEnabled}, #{createAt})
mapper.update: update webhook_endpoint set name=#{name}, url=#{url}, secret=#{secret}, events=#{events}, is_enabled=#{isEnabled}, update_at=#{updateAt} where webhook_id = #{webhookId}
